title: Massacre in the Black Forest
writer: Ferdinando Baldi, Adriano Bolzoni, Alessandro Ferraù
actors: Cameron Mitchell, Antonella Lualdi, Hans von Borsody
plot: In the first half of the first century A.D., the Teutonic tribes, led by Arminius The Terrible, rebel against the cruel and conquering Roman Empire. In raging torments and blood curdling battles, the barbarian tribes and Roman Leg...
